# Contributing

## JSDoc Policy

**Do not use HTML tags or `javascript:` hrefs in JSDoc comments.**

JSDoc descriptions are rendered verbatim in the Storybook Docs tab via
@compodoc/compodoc. Any HTML in a JSDoc comment is injected into the
rendered page. A `<script>` tag, event-handler attribute, or `javascript:`
href in a JSDoc comment becomes a stored-XSS payload delivered to every
developer who opens the Docs tab.

Write descriptions in plain text only. If you need to show a code
example, use a fenced code block in a story file or a separate `.mdx`
file -- not inline HTML in a JSDoc comment.

ESLint enforces this rule automatically. A PR that adds HTML to a JSDoc
comment will fail the lint step.
